originalTitle: STAY SHARP // Rogue Skin Reveal Trailer - VALORANT
content: Defy, advance, and go Rogue with a tactical kit engineered for precision. The Rogue skinline includes a Push Dagger Melee, Vandal, Bucky, Operator, and Bandit. — Music: “Undertow” by Brand X Music Music Supervision: Riot Games Music Team — Play VALORANT: https://riot.com/3idlntG Follow us: Twitter: https://riot.com/2HIv1s1 Instagram: https://riot.com/2S8uTnm TikTok: https://riot.com/3FwNKSE #VALORANT #RIOTGAMES #ROGUE
chineseContent: 使用专为精确设计的战术套件进行反抗、前进和潜行。盗贼皮肤包括推匕首近战、破坏者、巴基、干员和强盗。 — 音乐：Brand X Music 的《Undertow》 音乐监督：Riot Games 音乐团队 — Play VALORANT：https://riot.com/3idlntG 关注我们：Twitter：https://riot.com/2HIv1s1 Instagram：https://riot.com/2S8uTnm TikTok：https://riot.com/3FwNKSE #VALORANT #RIOTGAMES #ROGUE
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
